name: Karnataka Gruha Lakshmi
description: Monthly assistance for eligible woman head of household in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Gruha Lakshmi is a Karnataka household support scheme focused on women heads of eligible families.

notes: Applicant should be the woman head of an eligible Karnataka household.
Household-level exclusions may apply.

benefits.title: Monthly support
benefits.description: Paid to the eligible woman beneficiary.

applicationProcess.title: Check household eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Confirm ration card and household details.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through Seva Sindhu
applicationProcess.description: Use Seva Sindhu or local assisted centers.

applicationProcess.title: Track DBT
applicationProcess.description: Check payment status after approval.

name: Karnataka Raitha Siri
ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka
description: Incentive support for eligible millet-growing farmers in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Raitha Siri supports cultivation of nutri cereals/millets by providing assistance per hectare, subject to state guidelines and DBT verification.

notes: Farmer should cultivate eligible millet/nutri cereal crops.
Assistance is limited by area and state budget rules.

benefits.title: Millet cultivation incentive
benefits.description: Support may be limited to a maximum eligible area.

applicationProcess.title: Contact Raitha Samparka Kendra
applicationProcess.description: Check current notification and crop eligibility.

applicationProcess.title: Submit crop details
applicationProcess.description: Provide land and crop details for DBT verification.

applicationProcess.title: Track payment
applicationProcess.description: Follow up with agriculture department or local center.

name: Karnataka State Scholarship Portal
description: Karnataka portal for pre-matric and post-matric scholarship applications.
descriptionDetailed: The State Scholarship Portal lets eligible Karnataka students apply for department scholarships and track verification.

notes: Eligibility depends on course, department, category, and income rules.
Student must usually be enrolled in a recognized institution.

benefits.title: Scholarship assistance
benefits.description: Fee and maintenance support based on the selected scheme.

applicationProcess.title: Create SSP profile
applicationProcess.description: Register on the Karnataka SSP portal.

applicationProcess.title: Select eligible scholarship
applicationProcess.description: Fill education, income, and category details.

applicationProcess.title: Track verification
applicationProcess.description: Monitor institution and department verification online.

name: Karnataka Construction Worker Welfare Benefits
ministry: Karnataka Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
description: Welfare support for registered building and construction workers in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Registered construction workers can access welfare benefits such as education, medical, pension, and tool assistance depending on board rules.

notes: Applicant should be a registered construction worker.
Workdays and contribution/registration rules may apply.

benefits.title: Worker welfare support
benefits.description: Education, medical, pension, and other board benefits.

applicationProcess.title: Register as worker
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the labour department/board system.

applicationProcess.title: Select benefit
applicationProcess.description: Choose the benefit category and submit proof.

applicationProcess.title: Track approval
applicationProcess.description: Follow up through the portal or district labour office.

name: Sanjeevini Karnataka Rural Livelihood Mission
ministry: Skill Development, Entrepreneurship and Livelihood Department, Karnataka
description: Rural livelihood support through women self-help groups in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Sanjeevini-KSRLPS supports rural poor households through SHGs, livelihood clusters, producer companies, and financial inclusion.

notes: Usually accessed through SHG membership and local mission structures.
Support differs by block and livelihood programme.

benefits.title: SHG livelihood support
benefits.description: Support for farm and non-farm livelihoods through community institutions.

applicationProcess.title: Find local SHG
applicationProcess.description: Contact Gram Panchayat or KSRLPS block team.

applicationProcess.title: Join community process
applicationProcess.description: Participate in SHG savings, meetings, and livelihood planning.

applicationProcess.title: Access support
applicationProcess.description: Use SHG linkage for credit, training, and market support.

name: Mukhyamantri Raitha Vidya Nidhi
description: Scholarship scheme to promote higher education for the children of farmers.
descriptionDetailed: Aims to encourage the children of farmers to pursue higher education. Scholarships ranging from ₹2,000 to ₹11,000 are provided via Direct Benefit Transfer to students who have passed 10th standard and enrolled in recognized educational institutions.

notes: Applicant must be a child of a farmer.
Must be enrolled in PUC, ITI, Diploma, Degree, or postgraduate courses.

benefits.title: Scholarship
benefits.description: Direct Benefit Transfer based on the course pursued.

applicationProcess.title: Online via SSP
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the State Scholarship Portal using Farmer ID / FID and Aadhaar.

name: Karnataka Yuva Nidhi
description: Unemployment allowance for graduates and diploma holders in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Provides financial assistance to unemployed youth who have completed their graduation or diploma and remain unemployed for 6 months post graduation. Support is provided for up to 2 years.

notes: Must have completed a degree/diploma.
Assistance stops if employment is found or after 2 years.

benefits.title: Graduates Allowance
benefits.description: For unemployed degree holders.

benefits.title: Diploma Allowance
benefits.description: For unemployed diploma holders.

applicationProcess.title: Seva Sindhu
applicationProcess.description: Register on Seva Sindhu platform using certificates and Aadhaar.

name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam
description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,000 for women heads of eligible households in Tamil Nadu.
descriptionDetailed: A flagship scheme of Tamil Nadu providing ₹1,000 per month to women heads of households to recognize their lifelong work and improve household livelihoods.

notes: Must be the woman head of family on Public Distribution System (PDS) family card.
Annual family income must be under ₹2.5 lakh.

benefits.title: Monthly Cash Transfer
benefits.description: Direct Benefit Transfer to the bank account.

applicationProcess.title: Check Eligibility via Ration Card
applicationProcess.description: Ensure your name is registered as household head in ration card.

applicationProcess.title: Apply at special camps
applicationProcess.description: Submit application form at designated Fair Price Shop (FPS) localized camps.

name: Jagananna Amma Vodi
ministry: Department of School Education, Andhra Pradesh
description: Financial assistance to mothers for sending their children to schools and junior colleges in AP.
descriptionDetailed: Amma Vodi provides ₹15,000 annually to eligible mothers or recognized guardians from BPL families for sending their children to recognized schools or junior colleges (Class 1 to 12).

notes: Must possess a White Ration Card (BPL).
Child must maintain 75% attendance in school/college.

benefits.title: Annual Support for Education
benefits.description: Funds direct to mother’s unencumbered bank account.

applicationProcess.title: School Enrollment
applicationProcess.description: Ensure child is enrolled in a recognized institution.

applicationProcess.title: Verification by Village Secretariat
applicationProcess.description: Details verified through Village/Ward volunteers and Headmasters.

name: Rythu Bandhu
description: Financial assistance to farmers for two crops a year to meet investment needs.
descriptionDetailed: As an Agriculture Investment Support Scheme, Rythu Bandhu is implemented to relieve farmers of debt burden and assist them in procuring seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and field prep.

notes: Must own agricultural land (Pattadar).
Tenant farmers are currently excluded.

benefits.title: Investment Support
benefits.description: Total ₹10,000 per acre given yearly for Kharif and Rabi seasons.

applicationProcess.title: Pattadar Passbook Update
applicationProcess.description: Ensure land records are verified on the Dharani portal.

applicationProcess.title: Agricultural Extension Officer
applicationProcess.description: Submit bank details to local AEO for inclusion in DBT list.

name: LIFE Mission Kerala
description: Provides comprehensive housing for all landless and homeless residents in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: Livelihood Inclusion and Financial Empowerment (LIFE) is a comprehensive housing scheme ensuring safe housing for the homeless along with provisions for livelihoods, primary health care, and skill development.

notes: Priority for destitute, widows, differently-abled, and terminally ill.
Must not possess a habitable house anywhere in the state.

benefits.title: Housing Grant
benefits.description: Provided in phases linked to construction progress.

benefits.title: Housing complex allocation
benefits.description: Flats allocated to beneficiaries completely landless and homeless.

applicationProcess.title: Gram Sabha Selection
applicationProcess.description: Beneficiary list is drawn up strictly based on criteria and approved by local Gram Sabha.

applicationProcess.title: Submit through LSGD
applicationProcess.description: Register applications during the periodic LIFE mission surveys.

name: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana
description: Monthly financial assistance for women in Maharashtra to boost economic independence and health.
descriptionDetailed: The grand scheme in Maharashtra provides ₹1,500 every month to women aged strictly between 21 to 65 to promote self-reliance, better health, and financial independence for women of economically weaker backgrounds.

notes: Family income must be below ₹2.5 Lakh per year.
Widows and destitute women are prioritized.

benefits.title: Direct Cash Assistance
benefits.description: Directly transferred to Aadhaar-linked bank accounts.

applicationProcess.title: Nari Shakti Doot App / Portal
applicationProcess.description: Apply online using the official mobile application or portal.

applicationProcess.title: Anganwadi/Asha worker assistance
applicationProcess.description: Local centers facilitate offline applications.

documents: Domicile Certificate or 15 year residence proof
Income Certificate/Yellow or Orange Ration Card

name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
ministry: Department of Women and Child Development, Uttar Pradesh
description: Conditional cash transfer strategy to ensure the health and education of the girl child in UP.
descriptionDetailed: This initiative attempts to eliminate female feticide, promote education among girls and provide financial assistance of Rs. 15,000 for the girl child at 6 different stages of development including birth, vaccination, and school admissions.

notes: Family annual income limit is ₹3 Lakh.
Maximum 2 daughters from a family can avail the benefits.

benefits.title: Multi-stage Cash Transfer
benefits.description: Rs. 2,000 at birth, Rs. 1,000 at full immunization, Rs. 2,000 at Grade 1 admission, Rs. 2000 at Grade 6, Rs. 3,000 at Grade 9, Rs. 5,000 at Graduation/diploma.

applicationProcess.title: Portal Registration
applicationProcess.description: Register on the Kanya Sumangala Yojana online portal.

applicationProcess.title: Document Verification
applicationProcess.description: Respective stage documents (birth cert, school admission proof) uploaded online.

name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS)
ministry: Department of Health and Family Welfare, Tamil Nadu
description: Provides cashless hospitalization coverage up to ₹5 Lakh per family per year.
descriptionDetailed: CMCHIS provides quality health care to eligible persons through empanelled Government and Private hospitals and reduces the financial hardship of enrolled families.

notes: Family annual income should be less than ₹1,20,000.

benefits.title: Health Insurance Coverage
benefits.description: Cashless hospitalization for approved medical and surgical procedures.

applicationProcess.title: Enrollment at Collectorate
applicationProcess.description: Enroll via VAO / Kiosk at the District Collectorate with Income Certificate.

name: YSR Asara
ministry: Department of Rural Development, Andhra Pradesh
description: Reimbursement of outstanding bank loans for women Self Help Groups (SHGs).
descriptionDetailed: To empower women and elevate them from poverty by reimbursing the outstanding bank loans of SHG women as on cut-off date, directly into their bank accounts in installments.

notes: Must be a member of a registered Self Help Group (SHG) in AP.

benefits.title: Loan Reimbursement
benefits.description: Reimbursement is credited directly to SHG bank accounts.

applicationProcess.title: SHG Data Verification
applicationProcess.description: Data of SHGs is verified by SERP and MEPMA.

applicationProcess.title: Approval by Village Secretariat
applicationProcess.description: Verified lists are displayed at Village/Ward Secretariats.

name: Telangana Dalit Bandhu
description: One-time capital grant of ₹10 lakhs per SC family to set up a business.
descriptionDetailed: Aimed at the economic empowerment of Scheduled Caste families by providing them a direct grant of ₹10 lakhs to establish any viable income-generating enterprise.

notes: Applicable exclusively to Scheduled Caste (SC) households in Telangana.

benefits.title: Direct Capital Grant
benefits.description: Provided directly to the beneficiary's bank account for business establishment.

applicationProcess.title: Registration via Collectorate
applicationProcess.description: Submission of application at District Collectorate or online portal.

applicationProcess.title: Business Plan Selection
applicationProcess.description: Beneficiary selects a unit/business plan and gets it approved.

name: Chief Minister's Entrepreneurship Development Programme (CMEDP)
description: Provides financial assistance with interest subvention to promote startups in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: CMEDP aims to identify and train youth in Kerala to become entrepreneurs. It provides highly subsidized loans for setting up micro, small, and medium enterprises.

notes: Applicant must have a viable project proposal.
Upper age limit relaxed for specific categories like SC/ST and Women.

benefits.title: Subsidized Loan
benefits.description: Loans provided at highly subsidized effective interest rates.

applicationProcess.title: Project Submission
applicationProcess.description: Submit Business Plan online through Kerala Financial Corporation (KFC).

applicationProcess.title: Screening & Training
applicationProcess.description: Candidates undergo interview/screening followed by mandatory entrepreneurship training.

name: Karnataka Ganga Kalyana Scheme
description: Provides free irrigation facilities to farmers from minority, SC/ST, and OBC communities by drilling borewells.
descriptionDetailed: Ganga Kalyana scheme provides financial assistance towards the drilling of bore wells, installation of pump sets, and electrification for dry land held by marginal farmers.

notes: Must own dry land (minimum 2 to 5 acres).
Exclusively for marginal farmers from SC/ST/OBC/Minority groups.

benefits.title: Free Borewell & Pump Set
benefits.description: Complete cost coverage for drilling, pump set supply, and energization.

applicationProcess.title: Online Application
applicationProcess.description: Apply through Seva Sindhu or respective Development Corporation portals.

applicationProcess.title: Groundwater Survey
applicationProcess.description: Geologist report and feasibility check before drilling.

name: Karnataka Gruha Jyothi
description: Free electricity support for eligible domestic consumers in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Gruha Jyothi provides eligible Karnataka households free electricity up to the notified monthly consumption limit, linked to domestic electricity connections.

notes: Applicant should have a domestic electricity connection in Karnataka.
Consumer ID and Aadhaar-linked details are generally required.

benefits.title: Electricity bill support
benefits.amount: Up to 200 units/month as per rules
benefits.description: Eligible domestic consumption is subsidized through the electricity bill.

applicationProcess.title: Register on Seva Sindhu
applicationProcess.description: Submit consumer ID, Aadhaar, and mobile details online.

applicationProcess.title: Utility verification
applicationProcess.description: Electricity supply company verifies the consumer details.

name: Karnataka Anna Bhagya
ministry: Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs Department, Karnataka
description: Food grain and DBT support for eligible ration card households in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Anna Bhagya supports eligible priority households through food grain entitlement and cash transfer where applicable under state rules.

notes: Household should hold an eligible ration card.
Benefits depend on current food security department guidelines.

benefits.title: Food security support
benefits.description: Food grains or DBT support as notified by the state.

applicationProcess.title: Check ration card eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Use the food department portal or local fair price shop.

applicationProcess.title: Update household details
applicationProcess.description: Keep ration card, Aadhaar, and bank details updated.

name: Karnataka Krishi Bhagya
ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka
description: Farm pond and water conservation support for rainfed farmers in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Krishi Bhagya helps eligible farmers improve rainwater harvesting and farm productivity through farm ponds and related inputs.

notes: Farmer should have eligible agricultural land.
Priority and subsidy pattern depend on district and current notification.

benefits.title: Water conservation support
benefits.description: Support for farm ponds, lining, pump sets, and allied components where approved.

applicationProcess.title: Contact agriculture office
applicationProcess.description: Check eligibility at Raitha Samparka Kendra or agriculture department office.

applicationProcess.title: Submit land details
applicationProcess.description: Provide land record, bank, and farmer details for approval.

name: Karnataka Bhagyalakshmi Scheme
ministry: Department of Women and Child Development, Karnataka
description: Support for eligible girl children from economically weaker households in Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: Bhagyalakshmi is intended to encourage birth registration, education, health, and long-term support for eligible girl children.

notes: Girl child should belong to an eligible family as per department rules.
Birth registration and family eligibility documents may be required.

benefits.title: Girl child welfare support
benefits.description: Long-term financial and welfare support for eligible girl children.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through local WCD channel
applicationProcess.description: Contact Anganwadi or Women and Child Development office.

applicationProcess.title: Complete verification
applicationProcess.description: Submit birth, identity, and family eligibility documents.

name: Karnataka Prabuddha Overseas Scholarship
ministry: Social Welfare Department, Government of Karnataka
description: Overseas education assistance for eligible students from Karnataka.
descriptionDetailed: The scholarship supports eligible Karnataka students pursuing approved higher education abroad, subject to category, income, admission, and department rules.

notes: Applicant should be a Karnataka student with admission to an eligible foreign institution.
Category and income rules vary by department notification.

benefits.title: Overseas study assistance
benefits.amount: Varies by course and department cap
benefits.description: Support may cover tuition and maintenance components as per rules.

applicationProcess.title: Register on scholarship portal
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the Karnataka scholarship or department portal when applications are open.

applicationProcess.title: Upload admission proof
applicationProcess.description: Submit admission, income, category, and academic documents.

name: Karunya Health Security Scheme
ministry: State Health Agency, Government of Kerala
description: Cashless treatment support for eligible families in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: Karunya Health Security Scheme provides eligible Kerala families cashless hospital treatment through empanelled public and private hospitals.

notes: Eligibility follows State Health Agency and Ayushman Bharat-linked beneficiary rules.
Household should be listed or verified under applicable criteria.

benefits.title: Hospital treatment cover
benefits.amount: Up to Rs. 5 lakh/family/year where eligible
benefits.description: Cashless treatment for approved packages at empanelled hospitals.

applicationProcess.title: Check eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Use State Health Agency or hospital help desk support.

applicationProcess.title: Use at empanelled hospital
applicationProcess.description: Complete card and identity verification before treatment.

name: Kerala Snehapoorvam Scholarship
description: Educational support for eligible orphaned children in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: Snehapoorvam provides assistance to children who have lost one or both parents, helping them continue school or higher education.

notes: Applicant should be studying in a recognized institution.
Child should meet orphan or single-parent vulnerability criteria under current rules.

benefits.title: Education assistance
benefits.description: Periodic assistance to support education expenses.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through institution
applicationProcess.description: School or college submits verified application details.

applicationProcess.title: Mission verification
applicationProcess.description: Kerala Social Security Mission verifies eligibility before sanction.

documents: Death certificate of parent if applicable

name: Kerala Aswasakiranam
description: Financial assistance for caregivers of severely disabled or bedridden persons in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: Aswasakiranam provides monthly assistance to eligible caregivers who support people requiring long-term care.

notes: Care recipient should meet disability or bedridden criteria.
Medical certification and local verification may be required.

benefits.title: Caregiver assistance
benefits.description: Financial support for eligible caregivers.

applicationProcess.title: Submit application locally
applicationProcess.description: Apply through local body, social justice channel, or mission workflow.

applicationProcess.title: Medical verification
applicationProcess.description: Provide disability or medical certificate for verification.

name: Kerala Startup Mission Support
description: Incubation, grants, mentorship, and ecosystem support for startups in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: Kerala Startup Mission supports eligible startups and innovators through incubation, grants, product development support, mentorship, and market access programmes.

notes: Applicant should have an eligible startup, innovation, or founder profile.
Specific grants and programmes have separate criteria.

benefits.title: Startup ecosystem support
benefits.description: Grant, incubation, mentorship, infrastructure, and market access support.

applicationProcess.title: Create startup profile
applicationProcess.description: Register on Kerala Startup Mission platform.

applicationProcess.title: Apply to active programme
applicationProcess.description: Submit startup details and required documents for the selected support scheme.

name: Kudumbashree Livelihood Support
description: Women self-help group livelihood and financial inclusion support in Kerala.
descriptionDetailed: Kudumbashree supports women-led neighborhood groups through livelihood activities, micro-enterprises, credit linkage, training, and community development programmes.

notes: Usually accessed through Kudumbashree neighborhood group membership.
Benefits depend on local body and programme availability.

benefits.title: Livelihood and credit support
benefits.description: Support through SHGs, micro-enterprises, training, and credit linkage.

applicationProcess.title: Join neighborhood group
applicationProcess.description: Contact local Kudumbashree CDS or local self government office.

applicationProcess.title: Apply for programme support
applicationProcess.description: Use SHG or CDS channel for livelihood, credit, or training support.

name: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Pudhumai Penn Scheme
ministry: Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu
description: Monthly assistance for eligible girl students pursuing higher education in Tamil Nadu.
descriptionDetailed: Pudhumai Penn supports eligible girl students from government schools who continue into higher education, helping reduce dropouts and promote college enrollment.

notes: Student should meet school and higher education enrollment criteria.
Institution verification is generally required.

benefits.title: Monthly higher education support
benefits.description: DBT support for eligible students during higher education.

applicationProcess.title: Institution registration
applicationProcess.description: Apply through the official Pudhumai Penn portal and institution workflow.

applicationProcess.title: Track verification
applicationProcess.description: College verifies student and course details online.

name: Naan Mudhalvan
description: Skill, career guidance, and employability support for students and youth in Tamil Nadu.
descriptionDetailed: Naan Mudhalvan provides skill courses, assessments, career guidance, and employability services through institutions and online programmes.

notes: Eligibility varies by course, college, and programme track.
Students may access courses through their institution login.

benefits.title: Skill and career support
benefits.description: Access to skill training, assessments, mentorship, and job readiness resources.

applicationProcess.title: Register or login
applicationProcess.description: Use the Naan Mudhalvan portal or institution route.

applicationProcess.title: Choose course
applicationProcess.description: Select eligible skill course or assessment and complete enrollment.

name: Tamil Nadu Uzhavan Farmer Services
ministry: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Tamil Nadu
description: Digital agriculture services and scheme access support for farmers in Tamil Nadu.
descriptionDetailed: Uzhavan and Tamil Nadu agriculture portals help farmers access crop advisories, subsidy services, inputs, and department scheme information.

notes: Farmer should provide land or crop details where required.
Scheme-specific subsidy eligibility differs by component.

benefits.title: Agriculture services
benefits.description: Access to farmer services, subsidy information, advisories, and department support.

applicationProcess.title: Use agriculture portal
applicationProcess.description: Check eligible farmer services through the official agriculture portal.

applicationProcess.title: Submit crop details
applicationProcess.description: Provide land, crop, and bank details for applicable schemes.

name: StartupTN Support Programmes
ministry: Tamil Nadu Startup and Innovation Mission
description: Startup grants, mentorship, incubation, and market access support in Tamil Nadu.
descriptionDetailed: StartupTN supports eligible startups and innovators through grants, incubation, mentorship, procurement access, and ecosystem programmes.

notes: Applicant should have an eligible startup or innovation profile.
Specific grant programmes may require DPIIT or StartupTN registration.

benefits.title: Startup support
benefits.description: Grants, mentoring, incubation, investor connection, and market access support.

applicationProcess.title: Create StartupTN profile
applicationProcess.description: Register startup or founder profile on the official portal.

applicationProcess.title: Apply for programme
applicationProcess.description: Submit required details for active grants or support programmes.

name: Tamil Nadu Unorganised Workers Welfare Board Benefits
ministry: Labour Welfare and Skill Development Department, Tamil Nadu
description: Welfare assistance for registered unorganised workers in Tamil Nadu.
descriptionDetailed: Registered unorganised workers can access welfare benefits such as education, marriage, maternity, pension, accident, and death assistance as per board rules.

notes: Applicant should register with the relevant welfare board.
Benefit eligibility depends on registration status and board rules.

benefits.title: Worker welfare benefits
benefits.description: Education, pension, maternity, accident, death, and family welfare assistance.

applicationProcess.title: Register as worker
applicationProcess.description: Create worker registration through the official welfare board portal.

applicationProcess.title: Apply for benefit
applicationProcess.description: Choose eligible benefit and upload proof documents.

name: YSR Cheyutha
description: Financial assistance for eligible women from disadvantaged communities in Andhra Pradesh.
descriptionDetailed: YSR Cheyutha supports eligible women in the notified age group with phased financial assistance to improve livelihood and self-reliance.

notes: Applicant should meet community, age, and household eligibility rules.
Village or ward secretariat verification may apply.

benefits.title: Women livelihood assistance
benefits.description: DBT support for eligible women.

applicationProcess.title: Secretariat verification
applicationProcess.description: Beneficiary details are verified through village or ward secretariat systems.

applicationProcess.title: Check status online
applicationProcess.description: Use the beneficiary management portal where available.

name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena
description: Fee reimbursement support for eligible students in Andhra Pradesh.
descriptionDetailed: Jagananna Vidya Deevena supports eligible students pursuing higher education by reimbursing approved tuition fees through the state welfare education system.

notes: Student should be enrolled in an eligible course and institution.
Income, attendance, and other welfare rules apply.

benefits.title: Tuition fee reimbursement
benefits.amount: Approved fee amount as per rules
benefits.description: Fee support for eligible higher education students.

applicationProcess.title: Register on Jnanabhumi
applicationProcess.description: Submit student, course, and welfare details through the portal or institution.

applicationProcess.title: Institution verification
applicationProcess.description: College verifies attendance and course eligibility.

name: YSR Rythu Bharosa
description: Income support for eligible farmer families in Andhra Pradesh.
descriptionDetailed: YSR Rythu Bharosa provides income support to eligible farmer families, including tenant farmers where applicable under current state guidelines.

notes: Farmer family should satisfy land or tenancy eligibility rules.
Beneficiary verification is handled through local agriculture and secretariat systems.

benefits.title: Farmer income support
benefits.description: DBT support to eligible farmer families.

applicationProcess.title: Verify farmer details
applicationProcess.description: Submit land or tenancy details through local agriculture/secretariat channels.

applicationProcess.title: Check beneficiary status
applicationProcess.description: Use the state beneficiary portal where enabled.

name: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri
ministry: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri Health Care Trust
description: Cashless treatment support for eligible families in Andhra Pradesh.
descriptionDetailed: Dr. YSR Aarogyasri provides eligible families cashless treatment for approved procedures through network hospitals.

notes: Eligibility depends on state health card and household criteria.
Treatment must be at empanelled network hospitals for approved packages.

benefits.title: Cashless hospital treatment
benefits.description: Treatment support for listed therapies and procedures.

applicationProcess.title: Check health card eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Use Aarogyasri or village/ward secretariat support.

applicationProcess.title: Visit network hospital
applicationProcess.description: Complete verification at Aarogyasri help desk.

name: NTR Bharosa Pension Scheme
ministry: Society for Elimination of Rural Poverty, Andhra Pradesh
description: Monthly pension support for eligible elderly, widows, disabled persons, and other vulnerable groups in Andhra Pradesh.
descriptionDetailed: NTR Bharosa provides social security pensions to eligible vulnerable citizens through Andhra Pradesh delivery systems.

notes: Age and category rules vary for old-age, widow, disabled, and other pension types.
Household eligibility and local verification apply.

benefits.title: Monthly pension
benefits.description: Regular pension support for approved beneficiaries.

applicationProcess.title: Apply at secretariat
applicationProcess.description: Submit application through village or ward secretariat.

applicationProcess.title: Track pension status
applicationProcess.description: Use the state pension portal or local office.

name: Telangana Aasara Pensions
ministry: Society for Elimination of Rural Poverty, Telangana
description: Monthly pension assistance for eligible vulnerable citizens in Telangana.
descriptionDetailed: Aasara Pensions support eligible elderly persons, widows, disabled persons, toddy tappers, weavers, beedi workers, and other notified groups.

notes: Age and category requirements differ by pension type.
Local body and department verification are required.

benefits.title: Monthly pension
benefits.description: Pension support for approved beneficiaries.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through local office
applicationProcess.description: Submit pension application through local body or MeeSeva route.

applicationProcess.title: Check status
applicationProcess.description: Track pension details on the Aasara portal.

name: Kalyana Lakshmi / Shaadi Mubarak
description: Marriage assistance for eligible brides from low-income families in Telangana.
descriptionDetailed: Kalyana Lakshmi and Shaadi Mubarak provide financial assistance for marriage expenses of eligible brides from notified communities and income groups.

notes: Bride should be at least 18 years old.
Community and family income rules apply by scheme component.

benefits.title: Marriage assistance
benefits.description: One-time assistance for eligible brides.

applicationProcess.title: Apply online
applicationProcess.description: Submit application on the Telangana ePASS Kalyana Lakshmi portal.

applicationProcess.title: Upload certificates
applicationProcess.description: Provide income, caste/community, age, and marriage details for verification.

name: Telangana Post-Matric Scholarship and Fee Reimbursement
description: Scholarship and fee reimbursement support for eligible students in Telangana.
descriptionDetailed: Telangana ePASS enables eligible students to apply for post-matric scholarships, fee reimbursement, and related welfare education benefits.

notes: Eligibility varies by caste/community, course, institution, and family income.
Student and college verification are required.

benefits.title: Scholarship and fee support
benefits.description: Maintenance scholarship and eligible fee reimbursement.

applicationProcess.title: Register on ePASS
applicationProcess.description: Submit fresh or renewal scholarship application online.

applicationProcess.title: College verification
applicationProcess.description: Institution verifies admission, attendance, and course details.

name: Rajiv Aarogyasri Telangana
description: Cashless treatment support for eligible families in Telangana.
descriptionDetailed: Rajiv Aarogyasri provides eligible families access to cashless treatment for approved procedures at empanelled hospitals.

notes: Eligibility is based on state health card and household criteria.
Treatment must be through empanelled hospitals and approved packages.

benefits.title: Cashless hospital treatment
benefits.description: Hospital treatment support for approved procedures.

applicationProcess.title: Check card eligibility
applicationProcess.description: Use Aarogyasri help desk or official portal support.

applicationProcess.title: Hospital verification
applicationProcess.description: Complete verification at network hospital help desk.

name: Telangana Minority Economic Support Scheme
description: Economic assistance for eligible minority beneficiaries in Telangana.
descriptionDetailed: The Telangana State Minorities Finance Corporation supports eligible minority beneficiaries through economic support and self-employment assistance programmes.

notes: Applicant should belong to an eligible minority community.
Income, age, and project rules apply under current notification.

benefits.title: Self-employment support
benefits.amount: Varies by unit and subsidy pattern
benefits.description: Financial assistance for approved livelihood or business units.

applicationProcess.title: Apply on corporation portal
applicationProcess.description: Submit beneficiary and project details when applications are open.

applicationProcess.title: District verification
applicationProcess.description: District officials verify eligibility and project documents.

name: MahaDBT Post Matric Scholarship
description: Online scholarship and fee assistance portal for eligible Maharashtra students.
descriptionDetailed: MahaDBT allows eligible students to apply for post-matric scholarships and education fee benefits offered by Maharashtra departments.

notes: Eligibility varies by department, caste/category, course, and income.
Institute verification is required for most scholarship applications.

benefits.title: Scholarship or fee support
benefits.description: Tuition fee, exam fee, maintenance, or scholarship support depending on selected scheme.

applicationProcess.title: Register on MahaDBT
applicationProcess.description: Create profile and complete Aadhaar-linked verification.

applicationProcess.title: Apply to eligible scheme
applicationProcess.description: Select department scheme and submit academic and income details.

name: Maharashtra Lek Ladki Scheme
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Maharashtra
description: Financial assistance for eligible girl children in Maharashtra.
descriptionDetailed: Lek Ladki provides stage-wise financial assistance for eligible girls from economically weaker families to support health, education, and empowerment.

notes: Girl child should belong to an eligible Maharashtra family.
Benefits are linked to age or education milestones under current rules.

benefits.title: Stage-wise girl child assistance
benefits.description: Financial assistance at notified life and education stages.

applicationProcess.title: Contact WCD channel
applicationProcess.description: Apply through Anganwadi, local WCD office, or official department route.

applicationProcess.title: Submit family documents
applicationProcess.description: Provide birth, identity, residence, and income documents.

name: Maharashtra Bal Sangopan Yojana
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Maharashtra
description: Care and maintenance assistance for eligible vulnerable children in Maharashtra.
descriptionDetailed: Bal Sangopan Yojana supports children in difficult circumstances through family-based care assistance and child welfare department processes.

notes: Child should meet vulnerability criteria under child welfare rules.
Local child welfare verification is required.

benefits.title: Child care assistance
benefits.description: Support for care, education, and maintenance of eligible children.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through WCD office
applicationProcess.description: Submit application through district women and child development channel.

applicationProcess.title: Child welfare verification
applicationProcess.description: Documents and family circumstances are verified before sanction.

name: Magel Tyala Shettale
description: Farm pond assistance for eligible farmers in Maharashtra.
descriptionDetailed: Magel Tyala Shettale supports eligible farmers in creating farm ponds to improve water availability and drought resilience.

notes: Farmer should have eligible agricultural land.
Technical feasibility and district targets may apply.

benefits.title: Farm pond subsidy
benefits.description: Assistance for construction of approved farm ponds.

applicationProcess.title: Apply through Aaple Sarkar
applicationProcess.description: Submit application using state service portal or agriculture office route.

applicationProcess.title: Field verification
applicationProcess.description: Agriculture officials verify land and technical feasibility.

name: Maharashtra Seed Money Scheme
description: Seed money assistance for eligible unemployed entrepreneurs in Maharashtra.
descriptionDetailed: The Seed Money Scheme supports eligible entrepreneurs in Maharashtra with margin money or seed capital for approved self-employment and business projects.

notes: Applicant should have a viable self-employment project.
Project cost, age, and category rules apply under current guidelines.

benefits.title: Seed capital support
benefits.description: Margin money or financial support for approved enterprise projects.

applicationProcess.title: Register on industry portal
applicationProcess.description: Create applicant profile and submit project details.

applicationProcess.title: District scrutiny
applicationProcess.description: Project and eligibility are reviewed by district industry authorities.
